body: Where it began — a solid, theory-grounded foundation.
Volunteer internship improving web pages' feel and functionality.
Designed & built the cleaning-company site; brought back to expand it for their Airbnb business.
Designed & built a live property-management website (HTML/CSS/JS).
Led a marketing-automation project for a Polish automotive client; built ~300 email & SMS messages in Email Studio using HTML/CSS/JS and AMPScript across a multi-brand transformation.
